name: 𝗪𝗮𝗹𝘁𝗲𝗿-𝗫
description: A Whatsapp MD bot built in NodeJs to make experience better

ALIVE_MESSAGE.description: SET YOUR ALIVE MESSAGE FOR THE BOT
ALIVE_MESSAGE.value:
⚡ 𝗪𝗮𝗹𝘁𝗲𝗿-𝗫 𝗢𝗡𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗘 ⚡

I am online and ready to help you.

• Developed by DEV ABOODI
• WhatsApp Bot System

📌 Stay connected!

AUTO_STATUS_SAVER.description: Automatically saves status of every person and sends in log number.put true or false

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Fill the value true if you want bot view your Status or false.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Put HEROKU APP NAME same as above.

ANTI_BAD_WORD.description: Put words here. If you want it enabled in your bot otherwise leave it blank

LEVEL_UP_MESSAGE.description: Fill the value true if you want bot send Level up message in chat.

READ_MESSAGE.description: Fill the value true if you want bot to read all messages.

PREFIX.description: Enter your desired prefix for bot.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: The phone numbers of the users who you want to be admin for the bot

SESSION_ID.description: Please put your Session ID that u scanned from the bot

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Please put your OPENAI api key here.

MONGODB_URI.description: A secret String for Mongodb Connection.(Required)

THEME.description: Put the theme name you want to use.

heroku.description: Weather it is on heroku or not
